_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the Get Outlook Mail Messages shared-mailbox-Account sub-case (Branch 1 of get-outlook-mail-failures); mock dispatcher only -- do not treat as investigation evidence. The MailFolder ('Invoices') is a plain top-level folder that exists in a SHARED mailbox, but Account is blank so the activity resolves it against the default profile only and raises 'The specified folder does not exist'. docsai proxied to the real CLI; the --level Error logs rule precedes the generic logs rule. Matching is token-aware (first match wins); patterns are quote-agnostic.
